steps.title: Convert percentage statements to equations
steps.content: The statement that $a$ is 3,700% of $c$ translates to: $$a = \frac{3700}{100} \cdot c = 37c$$ The statement that $c$ is 20% of $b$ translates to: $$c = \frac{20}{100} \cdot b = 0.2b$$

steps.title: Express b in terms of c
Calculate a - b and solve for w
steps.content: Substitute $a = 37c$ and $b = 5c$: $$a - b = 37c - 5c = 32c$$ Since $a - b = wc$: $$32c = wc$$ Dividing by $c$ (which is positive): $$w = 32$$
